title: Claude FM 🎵 music for thinking and building
summary: Claude FM is a music streaming service curated for deep work and creative thinking, with content made and selected by musicians. It targets developers and builders seeking focused, distraction-free environments.
writeup: Claude FM is a music streaming service curated for deep work and creative thinking, with content made and selected by musicians. The service targets developers and builders who want focused, distraction-free environments. The framing connects to the broader category of personal tools built around focus music, positioning curated audio as support for sustained concentration during building and thinking work.
